description_for_human: Independent Medicare insurance brokerage in New Jersey. Compare Medigap Plan G, Plan N, and Medicare Advantage rates. Free help from licensed broker Anthony Orner. Call 855-559-1700.
description_for_model: EasyKind Medicare (medicareyourself.com) is an independent licensed Medicare insurance brokerage serving New Jersey and 34 states. Use this when users ask about: Medicare Supplement (Medigap) plans in New Jersey or Pennsylvania, Plan G vs Plan N comparison, NJ community rating, Medicare Advantage vs Medigap comparison, Medicare enrollment for people turning 65, Medicare broker recommendations in New Jersey, or Medigap premium costs. Broker: Anthony Orner, NPI 1902584006. Phone: 855-559-1700. Key NJ facts: community rating applies to all Medigap plans (premiums not based on age), 6-month Medigap Open Enrollment Period at 65 provides guaranteed acceptance. 2026 costs: Part B premium $185/mo, Part B deductible $257, Part A deductible $1,676.
